member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PreExecuteDecision
member.summary: Options to continue when PreExecute.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PreExecuteDecision.Continue
member.summary: Continue the execution

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PreExecuteDecision.StopPort0
member.summary: Stop the execution and exit port 0.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PreExecuteDecision.StopPort1
member.summary: Stop the execution and exit port 1.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.ITiuIdentityExtension
member.summary: Class to define extendable method.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.ITiuIdentityExtension.CustomValidation
member.summary: Called in Execute() to execute custom identity validations. E.g Eeprom Serial Validation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.ITiuIdentityExtension.PreExecuteEvaluation
member.summary: Called in Execute() to evaluate special conditions prior to main identity validation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuIdentityTestMethod
member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuIdentityTestMethod.ValidTiuRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets the TIU Regexes in comma separated list.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuIdentityTestMethod.ValidMetalFrameRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets the MetalFrame Regexes in comma separated list.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuIdentityTestMethod.ValidElastomerSheetRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets the ElastomerSheet Regexes in comma separated list.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuIdentityTestMethod.ValidBottomElastomerSheetRegex
member.summary: Gets or sets the ElastomerSheet Regexes in comma separated list.

member.summary: Dummy description of this test method.

member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuResistanceTestMethod
member.summary: This test method calculates resistance and compares againts limits if provided.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuResistanceTestMethod.AttributeVForce
member.summary: Attribute Name VForce.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuResistanceTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc to use.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuResistanceTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuResistanceTestMethod.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated Pins to get DC results for. The value must be in Ohm.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuResistanceTestMethod.LowLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated low limits for the measure Pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuResistanceTestMethod.HighLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated high limits for the measure Pins.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuSignalPinLeakageTestMethod
member.summary: Prime Test Method to test signal pins leakage on TIU.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.PrimeTiuSignalPinLeakageTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.ITiuValidationBaseParams
member.summary: Interface to define base parameter for TIU Validation Test Methods.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.ITiuValidationBaseParams.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins to get DC Results for.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.ITiuValidationBaseParams.HighLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated upper limits for the measured pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.ITiuValidationBaseParams.LowLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated lower limits for the measured pins.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinInformation
member.summary: Structure to contain information on the pins such as name, highLimit and lowLimit.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinInformation.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinInformation.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the pin or pingroup.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinInformation.HighLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the upper limit of the measurement in ohm.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinInformation.LowLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the lower limit of the measurement in ohm.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinInformation.Pins
member.summary: Gets the list of pins if it is a pingroup.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinInformation.IsGroup
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the pin is a pingroup.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinResults
member.summary: Class to hold the averaged pin results.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinResults.PinGroup
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the pingroup this pin is part of.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinResults.AveragedPinResults
member.summary: Gets or sets the averaged results of the dc measurement for the pin. The key is the Pin name. The value is the averaged value of the measurement.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinResults.ToString
member.summary: Construct the string result to be printed on console.
member.returns: The result in string format for console printing.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.IPinValidator
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods for PinValidator.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.IPinValidator.IsThisPinSupported(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Check the given pin is supported for this test method or not.
member.returns: True if the pin is supported.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinValidatorBase
member.summary: Base class for PinValidator.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinValidatorBase.SupportedPins
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of supported pins.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinSelector
member.summary: Enum for the pin selection.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinSelector.DPS
member.summary: Digital Power Supply Pins.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinSelector.DPIN
member.summary: Digital Signal Pins.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinValidatorFactory
member.summary: Class to get the correct pin validator class. This will act as boundary for future changes if there's specific implementation changes are required. E.g New TOS version defined the resource type differently. This is required since by hook or by crook we have to maintain a list of supported pins. This will minimized the impact if changes are required.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinValidatorFactory.PinSelect
member.summary: Gets or sets pin to be selected for validation; DPS vs DPIN.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinValidatorFactory.PinValidator
member.summary: Gets or Sets the Pin Validator class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.Tos3DpinValidator
member.summary: Supported digital pins for Tiu Resistance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.Tos3DpinValidator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.Tos3DpsPinValidator
member.summary: Supported digital power supply pins for Continuity test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.Tos3DpsPinValidator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods
member.summary: Base class test method for TIU Validation Infrastructure.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.VerifyThisPinIsSupported(System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinValidator.PinSelector,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Verify if this pin is supported by the validator.
member.param: The type of the pin to be validated against.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.GetParameterName``1(``0)
member.summary: Helper method to get the parameter name.
member.param: The object that we want the name of.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.VerifyLimitsAreMatched(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Verify that both upper and lower limit counts are matched.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.VerifyLimitChecksRequirement(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Verifies limit checks.
member.returns: true if limits are to be checked, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.VerifyLimitAndPinMatched(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Verify that the limits and the pin count matched.
member.exception: The pins and limits does not match.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.PopulatePinInfo(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Populate the pin information object.
member.param: Check the limit is enabled or not.
member.returns: Dictionary of pin information objects with the pin name as the key.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.GetDcTestCurrentMeasurement(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get Dc Test for current measurement.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.PostProcessDcResults(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.DcService.IPinGroupDcResults})
member.summary: Post process the results.
member.param: The list of the results at pinGroup level.
member.returns: The processed results. The key is the pinGroup name, empty if the measurement doesn't belong to a pinGroup.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.TiuValidationCommonMethods.ConstructResultsPrintOut(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,Prime.TestMethods.Tiu.TiuValidationCommon.PinInformation.PinResults})
member.summary: Construct the result printout for console printing.
Validate the DC results to be within the specified limits of the pins.
member.param: The list of pin information that includes the upper and lower limits.
